directive: Perform a full sweep of the auth and login subsystems: audit storage, provider mapping, startup hydration, status surfaces, logout, refresh flows, and consumer checks for consistency; fix any concrete issues found, add tests, and commit the changes.

children.description: Audit and fix auth core consistency in core/crates/omegon/src/auth.rs and closely related provider resolution code: provider map usage, auth.json read/write/refresh/logout semantics, persistence verification, and tests for canonical credential behavior.
children.label: auth-core-audit

children.description: Audit and fix startup hydration and status/reporting surfaces so persisted credentials, environment export, and auth status outputs are consistent across runs. Cover setup, main/control auth commands, and add tests where practical.
children.label: startup-and-status-audit

children.description: Audit and fix consumer/UI surfaces that infer auth availability so they use canonical auth resolution instead of ad hoc env checks, while preserving explicit product-policy distinctions. Cover tutorial/model catalog/TUI-related surfaces and add tests.
children.label: consumer-surface-audit

plan.rationale: Auth/login consistency spans distinct boundaries: credential storage, process startup/status plumbing, and downstream consumer behavior. Splitting by boundary isolates findings and keeps fixes evidence-driven.
